subject: EP240806a: KAIT optical observations
body:
WeiKang Zheng (UCB), Xuhui Han (NAOC), Pinpin Zhang (NAOC) and

Alexei V. Filippenko (UCB) report on behalf of the KAIT GRB team:



The 0.76-m Katzman Automatic Imaging Telescope (KAIT), located at

Lick Observatory, automatically responded to the fast X-ray

transient EP240806a from the Einstein Probe (Wu et al. GCNC 37063)

starting at 09:23 UT, ~4.60 hours after the trigger. A set of 24x60s

clear (roughly R) filter images were obtained. The optical counterpart

reported by Li et al. (GCN 37064), Izzo et al. (GCN 37065) and

Pérez-Fournon et al. (GCN 37080) was marginally detected in our

coadded images. The preliminary photometry gives a results of

21.6 +/- 0.1 mag at a mid time of 5.14 hours after the trigger.
